userStories.title: Alembic migrations - perfil_entidad, obligacion_perfil, obligacion_fuente
acceptanceCriteria: Create Alembic migration for the 3 applicability tables
Apply through Alembic, not runtime DDL
Verify all 3 tables exist in production and RLS is enabled
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; $COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -c '\dt perfil_entidad obligacion_perfil obligacion_fuente' && echo PASS || echo FAIL-TABLES-MISSING

userStories.title: Define MCP tool contracts - before any implementation
acceptanceCriteria: Define listar_perfiles_entidad, obtener_obligaciones_perfil, calendario_obligaciones_perfil contracts
Define flat output schemas with source_url and evidence_notice
Add contract tests
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/api/tests/test_mcp_tool_contracts_perfil.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10 | grep -E 'passed|PASSED' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Seed perfil_entidad - 6 supervised entity profiles
acceptanceCriteria: Seed sociedad_valores, agencia_valores, sgiic, eaf, entidad_credito, empresa_servicios_pago
Verify LIVMC and LEY10_2010 before seeding
All 6 rows active
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM perfil_entidad WHERE activo=true'); echo "Profiles: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 6 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Seed sociedad_valores - fiscal obligations (AEAT)
acceptanceCriteria: Seed fiscal AEAT obligations for sociedad_valores
Every obligation has source_url
verified=true only when norma/articulo/source_url/model are confirmed
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE perfil_codigo='sociedad_valores' AND obligacion_tipo IN ('AUTOLIQUIDACION','DECLARACION_INFORMATIVA')"); echo "Fiscal obligations: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 8 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Seed sociedad_valores - PBC/FT obligations
acceptanceCriteria: Seed PBC/FT obligations from LEY10_2010 and RD_304_2014
Add obligacion_fuente rows
Use SEPBLAC rows as secondary sources when available
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE perfil_codigo='sociedad_valores' AND obligacion_tipo IN ('DILIGENCIA_DEBIDA','COMUNICACION_INDICIO','CONTROL_INTERNO','FORMACION','REGISTRO')"); echo "PBC/FT obligations: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 6 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Seed sociedad_valores - CNMV/market obligations
acceptanceCriteria: Seed CNMV and market obligations from LIVMC and CNMV circulars
Conditional obligations marked parcial
Add circular secondary sources where available
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE perfil_codigo='sociedad_valores' AND obligacion_tipo IN ('REPORTING','CONTROL_INTERNO','FORMACION')"); echo "CNMV obligations: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 5 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Implement MCP tools - wire contracts to DB
acceptanceCriteria: Wire the 3 MCP contracts to DB queries
Return flat obligations with evidence notices
Register tools in MCP registry
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/api/tests/test_mcp_tools_perfil.py -v 2>&1 | tail -15 | grep -E 'passed|PASSED' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: REST API endpoints - /v1/perfil thin wrapper over MCP tools
acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/api/routers/perfil.py
Expose list, detail, obligations, and calendar endpoints
Do not duplicate MCP tool logic
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/api/tests/test_perfil_router.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10 | grep -E 'passed|PASSED' && curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/perfil/sociedad_valores/obligaciones | jq 'length' | awk '{if ($1>=15) print "PASS"; else print "FAIL: " $1}' || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Seed agencia_valores and SGIIC obligations
acceptanceCriteria: Seed agencia_valores obligations with LIVMC art.144 caveat where needed
Seed SGIIC obligations from RD_1082_2012 and shared PBC/FT duties
Mark uncertain obligations as parcial
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; for P in agencia_valores sgiic; do COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE perfil_codigo='$P'"); echo "$P: $COUNT"; done && echo PASS

userStories.title: Update mcp_validation_suite - profile and applicability checks
acceptanceCriteria: Add profile/applicability checks to mcp_validation_suite.py
Add MCP contract checks to mcp_deep_contract_audit.py
Both suites return ok=true
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm worker python mcp_validation_suite.py --read-only --base-url http://api:8000 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm worker python mcp_deep_contract_audit.py 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Final verification - Sprint C complete
acceptanceCriteria: Tables populated and tools registered
API endpoints working
pytest apps/ and validation suites pass
Coverage report and roadmap updated
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/ -q --basetemp .pytest-tmp 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep 'passed' && curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/perfil/sociedad_valores/obligaciones | jq '.total' | awk '{if ($1>=15) print "PASS"; else print "FAIL: only " $1}' || echo FAIL
